headline: Top S&P500 movers in Thursday's after hours session
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets after the closing bell on Thursday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's after hours session.

headline: Datadog Stock In The Spotlight After Hunterbrook Names Anthropic As Major Client
summary: Shares of Datadog spiked Thursday afternoon following an investigative report from Hunterbrook Media identifying Anthropic as the unnamed AI giant behind the company's massive new contract.
